# API Reference {.doc .doc-index}

## HTML Grid Layouts

⭐ Create multi-figure HTML dashboards with grid and tabbed layouts

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [create_plotly_grid_html](create_plotly_grid_html.qmd#mdu.plotly.html_grids.create_plotly_grid_html) | Compose multiple Plotly figures into a single HTML file with grid layout. |
| [create_tabbed_plotly_grid_html](create_tabbed_plotly_grid_html.qmd#mdu.plotly.html_grids.create_tabbed_plotly_grid_html) | Create multi-tab HTML dashboard with custom grid layout per tab. |

## Multi-line Plotting

⭐ Advanced line plots with statistical overlays and significance testing

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [multiline_plot](multiline_plot.qmd#mdu.plotly.multiline.multiline_plot) | Create line plot with multiple groups and optional statistical overlays. |

## Statistical Testing

⭐ Add statistical significance indicators and model fits to plots

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [add_cluster_permut_sig_to_plotly](add_cluster_permut_sig_to_plotly.qmd#mdu.plotly.stats.add_cluster_permut_sig_to_plotly) | Add cluster-based permutation test significance indicators to time series plot. |
| [add_statsmodel_fit](add_statsmodel_fit.qmd#mdu.plotly.stats.add_statsmodel_fit) | Add statistical model fit with confidence intervals to Plotly figure. |
| [add_box_significance_indicator](add_box_significance_indicator.qmd#mdu.plotly.stats.add_box_significance_indicator) | Add statistical significance indicators between box or violin plots. |

## Plot Enhancements

⭐ Add metadata and utility functions for enhanced plots

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [add_meta_info](add_meta_info.qmd#mdu.plotly.shared.add_meta_info) | Adds a metadata info symbol 'ⓘ' to a Plotly figure. |
| [hex_to_rgba](hex_to_rgba.qmd#mdu.plotly.shared.hex_to_rgba) | Convert hex color code to RGBA string format. |
| [format_float_to_text_with_suffix](format_float_to_text_with_suffix.qmd#mdu.plotly.shared.format_float_to_text_with_suffix) | Format a float with metric suffix and up to 2 decimal places. |

## Time Series Plotting

Time series visualization with optional resampling

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [plot_ts](plot_ts.qmd#mdu.plotly.time_series.plot_ts) | Plot one or multiple time series with optional resampling. |
| [DataShapeError](DataShapeError.qmd#mdu.plotly.time_series.DataShapeError) | Exception raised when data has incompatible shape for plotting. |

## Plotly Templates

Custom styling templates

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [set_template](set_template.qmd#mdu.plotly.template.set_template) | Set custom Plotly template with default styling for box and violin plots. |

## ML Plotting

Machine learning visualizations

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [plot_roc_curve](plot_roc_curve.qmd#mdu.plotly.ml.plot_roc_curve) | Plot ROC (Receiver Operating Characteristic) curve with AUC. |

## MNE Plotting

⭐ Interactive EEG/MEG visualization with topoplots and ERPs

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [plot_evoked](plot_evoked.qmd#mdu.plotly.mne_plotting.plot_evoked) | Create interactive evoked response plot with optional topoplots. |
| [plot_topo](plot_topo.qmd#mdu.plotly.mne_plotting.plot_topo) | Plot a topoplot from data and an mne instance for meta data information. |

## MNE Events

MNE event mapping utilities

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [inverse_map_events](inverse_map_events.qmd#mdu.mne.events.inverse_map_events) | Inverse map of events in evid -> use numbers in evid values if present |

## MNE Data Conversion

⭐ Convert MNE Raw and Epochs to Polars DataFrames

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [mne_raw_to_polars](mne_raw_to_polars.qmd#mdu.mne.mne2dataframe.mne_raw_to_polars) | Convert MNE Raw object to Polars DataFrame. |
| [mne_epochs_to_polars](mne_epochs_to_polars.qmd#mdu.mne.mne2dataframe.mne_epochs_to_polars) | Convert MNE Epochs object to Polars DataFrame. |

## Type Converters

Type conversion utilities

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [ToFloatConverter](ToFloatConverter.qmd#mdu.utils.converters.ToFloatConverter) | Conversion from numpy array of various data formats to float and back |
